item.title: Dirty Laundry Season 5 Trailer
item.description:
It’s time to shake things up. New season premieres July 15th.

Duration: 01:51

Tags: Dirty Laundry, lily du, grant o'brien, talk shows, competitions, drinking, never have i ever, embarrassing, terrible things
